zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert de Tregoz II於1190年出生在英國賀福爾艾亞斯 哈羅德時，他的父親Robert de Tregoz I22歲，母親Sibyl de Ewyas Lady of Burneham12歲。他於1245年8月1日之前與Juliane de Cantilupe結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1265年8月4日在英國武斯特斯爾艾維沙安享年75歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭艾可蕾托 登莫福。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Tregoz
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cornish (Cornwall and Devon): habitational name from Treago in Crantock (Cornwall). The placename derives from Middle Cornish tre ‘estate, farmstead’ + uncertain final element.
Altered form of French   Tricot   or of some other similar (like-sounding) surname. It was reportedly brought to North America from England. Today it is found mainly in PA and OH. Compare   Trago  .
History: This surname (see 2 above) is listed in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors and also in the similar register of the Huguenot Society of America.

variants.name: Trago
meanings: Variant of   Trego  , a surname of Cornish and French origin. In the US, it is found mainly in PA and OH.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert de Tregoz II was born in 1190, in Ewyas Harold, Herefordshire, England, his father, Robert de Tregoz I, was 22 and his mother, Sibyl de Ewyas Lady of Burneham, was 12. He married Juliane de Cantilupe before 1 August 1245. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 4 August 1265, in Evesham, Worcestershire, England, at the age of 75, and was buried in Little Dunmow, Essex, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert de Tregoz II est né en 1190, à Ewyas Harold, Herefordshire, Angleterre, son père, Robert de Tregoz I, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Sibyl d’Ewyas Lady of Burneham, avait 12 ans. Il a épousé Juliane de Cantilupe avant 1 août 1245. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 4 août 1265, à Evesham, Worcestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 75 ans, et a été enterré à Little Dunmow, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Little Dunmow, Essex, England: Little Dunmow, Essex, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Robert de Tregoz II 1190 in Ewyas Harold, Herefordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert de Tregoz I 22 und seine Mutter Sibyl de Ewyas Lady of Burneham 12. Er hat vor 1. August 1245 Juliane de Cantilupe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 4. August 1265 im Alter von 75 Jahren in Evesham, Worcestershire, England und wurde in Little Dunmow, Essex, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lui sposato Juliane de Cantilupe prima del 1 agosto 1245. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 4 agosto 1265, nel Evesham, Worcestershire, England, all'età di 75 anni, e fu sepolto a Little Dunmow, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ko.lifeSummary: Robert de Tregoz II(이)가 1190년 영국 허퍼드실르 와이아스 하로드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert de Tregoz I(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Sibyl de Ewyas Lady of Burneham(은)는 12세였다. 그는 1245년 8월 1일 이전 Juliane de Cantilupe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1265년 8월 4일 영국 워스스터실르 에베샤에서 75세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 리틀 던모에 묻혔다.

Ele casou-se com Juliane de Cantilupe antes 1 de agosto de 1245. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 4 de agosto de 1265, em Evesham, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, com 75 anos, e foi sepultado em Little Dunmow, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert de Tregoz II родился в 1190 г. в местности ювяс харолд, хирефордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert de Tregoz I было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Sibyl de Ewyas Lady of Burneham, 12. Он женился на женщине по имени Juliane de Cantilupe перед 1 августа 1245 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 4 августа 1265 г. в местности эвешам, ворсестиршир, Англия в возрасте 75 лет и был похоронен в местности литл дунмоу, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания.
